deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก

root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code, ( SELECT count( distinct sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status is NULL ) OR ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' ) ) and sc_dep_m_rule.insure_status = '0' ) as count_memno, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, count(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no) as c_countacc, count( distinct sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) as c_memno, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sum( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance ) as c_balance, sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_cls_confirm_data WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( sc_dep_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno ) and ( ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' ) AND ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance <> 0 ) AND ( sc_dep_m_rule.insure_status = '0' ) ) and sc_dep_m_rule.invest_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ORDER BY sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code ASC, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code ASC
